decisions.summary: Gate review dispatch at the single choke point spawnReviewRoleForIssuePromise (src/lib/cloister/review-agent.ts:296). All five dispatch paths route through it (deacon orphan-pending redispatch deacon.ts~1971, checkPostReviewCommits redispatch deacon.ts~2904, cloister startup recovery service.ts~773, HTTP trigger specialists.ts~1581, workspaces.ts review-request ~3625/~3831), so one gate covers everything. Verified: blockerReasons appears NOWHERE in src/lib/cloister/ today.
Gate scope: merge_conflict + not_mergeable blocker types only. Other blocker types (failing_checks, draft_pr, changes_requested, unresolved_conversations) do not gate review.

Freshness re-verification via local git probe (git fetch + git merge-tree --write-tree, non-destructive, git>=2.38), not GitHub API. Probe 'clean' clears the stale blocker and lets review proceed; 'conflicts' or 'unknown' defers review and dispatches a resolver.

Conflict resolution dispatched as work-role agent via spawnRun(issueId, 'work', {prompt}) reusing the PAN-1691 both-features-intent prompt pattern from merge-train-deps.dispatchConflictResolver. NOT syncMainIntoWorkspace (operator-surfaced since PAN-1531) and NOT ship role.

Gated result shape: { success: false, gated: true, message }. Review status stays 'pending' so the deacon pending-redispatch loop is the natural retry; callers log calm deferral and never increment reviewRetryCount (PAN-794 breaker must not trip on gated deferrals).

Throttles: in-memory probe cache ~3 min per issue (deacon patrols every 60s must not git-fetch per tick); resolver re-dispatch >=30 min via new persisted ReviewStatus.conflictResolutionDispatchedAt (SQLite column conflict_resolution_dispatched_at, try/catch ALTER migration pattern schema.ts~1036ff) plus spawnRun session-exists idempotency.

force:true does NOT bypass the gate — checkPostReviewCommits passes force:true so force cannot discriminate humans from automation, and verdicts on unmergeable branches are void regardless of who asked.

Secondary fix (per issue text): merge-blocker-reconcile-service.ts line 47 currently skips rows that already have blockers, so stale flags never clear without a webhook. Extend reconcileOnce to re-verify merge_conflict/not_mergeable-flagged rows on a slower cadence (~10 min) via refreshMergeStateFromGitHub, which already removes the blocker when GitHub reports mergeable (webhook-handlers.ts~400).

hazards.summary: Stranding risk: a gated issue must self-recover. Review stays 'pending'; the deacon orphan-pending redispatch retries every patrol; once the resolver pushes a clean rebase the probe clears the blocker and dispatch proceeds. Do not flip review status to a new state ('blocked' etc.) — that would break the redispatch conditions (reviewStatus==='pending' && completed.processed && prUrl).
hazards.mitigation: Keep status 'pending' + reviewNotes only. Verify the redispatch loop end-to-end in deacon-gated-deferral tests.

hazards.summary: Retry-counter poisoning: deacon paths increment reviewRetryCount and trip the PAN-794 review-infra breaker after repeated 'failed' dispatches. Gated deferrals are expected steady-state for many ticks while a resolver works.
hazards.mitigation: gated results must never increment reviewRetryCount nor count toward the breaker; assert across N simulated patrol ticks.

hazards.summary: Probe cost: the gate runs on every dispatch attempt; deacon patrols are 60s. Unthrottled git fetch per issue per tick hammers origin across many flagged issues.
hazards.mitigation: In-memory per-issue probe cache (~3 min) with a test-reset hook; resolver dispatch throttled via persisted conflictResolutionDispatchedAt (30 min).

hazards.summary: spawnRun throws 'already running. Use pan tell' when the work session exists (agents.ts~3269). The resolver dispatch must catch this and treat it as already-dispatched, never crash the gate or the patrol.
hazards.mitigation: Explicit catch in dispatchResolver; unit test for the already-running path.

hazards.summary: Do not regress adjacent review-agent logic: PAN-1131 stale-runId convoy respawn, PAN-1531 feedback archiving (a gated dispatch must NOT archive previous-cycle feedback the work agent still needs), PAN-1665 advancing-ceiling slot accounting (gated issue must not hold a slot), PAN-1213 tree-identical-rebase guard in checkPostReviewCommits.
hazards.mitigation: Gate placement after session-idempotency but before reviewing-status write and before feedback archiving; release any reserved advancing slot on gated result; keep existing tests green.

hazards.summary: merge-train-deps.reDispatchVerification (merge-train-deps.ts:60) calls spawnRun(issueId,'review') directly, bypassing spawnReviewRoleForIssue — a pre-existing separate path. It only fires after a CLEAN rebase so conflict gating is not needed there. Out of scope; do not 'fix' it in this issue.
hazards.mitigation: Leave untouched (surgical-changes rule). Noted for a future issue if it misbehaves.

hazards.summary: deacon hasPassedReview reads the LATEST history entry per type. Gating must not append misleading status_history entries (e.g. a synthetic 'pending' entry) that could confuse restore-from-history logic (deacon.ts~1811-1832).
hazards.mitigation: Gated path writes reviewNotes only, never reviewStatus transitions or history-changing status flips.

hazards.summary: Timer-based tests (probe cache, dispatch throttle, reconcile-service cadence) must use vi.useFakeTimers — real delays cause OOM when parallelized (CLAUDE.md rule).
hazards.mitigation: Fake timers in all throttle/cadence tests; no maxForks workarounds.

sessionHistory.note: Planning session started for PAN-1765: bug(pipeline): conflict-flagged branches churn full review convoys — passed verdicts reset minutes later; conflict resolution should gate review dispatch

Auto-mode discovery complete. Verified root causes: (1) no review dispatch path consults blockerReasons (zero hits in src/lib/cloister/); (2) checkPostReviewCommits resets passed verdicts on any HEAD tree change (the 05:31:56 signature) and force-redispatches convoys; (3) PAN-1620 reconcile service skips already-flagged rows so stale conflict flags never clear; (4) conflict resolution machinery exists only in the post-merge train reconciler. Plan: conflict gate at spawnReviewRoleForIssuePromise + resolver dispatch + stale-flag re-verification. 8 beads, vBRIEF written.
